title: BudgetRef
description: A small typed pointer to a Budget node. Used by Agents and Evals that want to attach to an existing budget tree without inlining the node definition. The `kind` field is a discriminator so codegen produces a tagged-union (sum type) instead of an ambiguous string.

kind.description: Reference kind. `id` = a Budget ULID; `url` = a fully-qualified `$id` URL; `name` = a human-name lookup within the active Run's budget tree.

value.description: The reference value. Format depends on `kind`.
